ValidationRule.description: Stage 6 is used as additional Closed Stage in AMEA/APAC, but not in Americas. We need to warn uses not to select this stage.
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( NOT($Permission.C_PERM_8020_Bypass_Opp_V_RULE) , DateValue(CreatedDate) >= $Setup.CSET_9900__c.OppCutoverDate__c , TEXT(StageName) = "Stage 6 - Implement (Closed)" , fxRecordTypeName__c = "PKI SPI Sales Process" , TEXT(Owner.PKISuperTerritory__c) = "Americas" )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: V.RULE_OPP_080: For Americas users, you need to select "Closed Won" instead of "Stage 6"
